---
title: "Things"
---

Things I like:

- Coffee
- Globalization & Free markets
- That one part in [Nimrodel](https://youtu.be/NYC3BWroCsU?si=bkSEZQDHGjRUHzHk&t=420)
- [Marc-Andre Hamelin](https://youtu.be/u3-WbNcsfuk?si=u_Ls0Y7RWc1sN38n&t=920)
- BTN Overhead Press
- Quarto (esp. labels)

Things I dislike:

- My evil twin Bihn
